entries.text:
Verse 4

falling into

i.e. prostrated by the prophetic impulse. See, 1 Samuel 19:24; Ezekiel 1:23; Daniel 8:18; 2 Corinthians 12:2-4; Revelation 1:10; Revelation 1:17.

Verse 17

Sceptre

See "Kingdom" (See Scofield "Genesis 1:26"), See Scofield "Zechariah 12:8".

Verse 20

nations

Or, the first of the nations that warred against Isael. (See Scofield "Exodus 17:8").

Verse 24

Chittim

Pronounced Kittim. Genesis 10:4; Daniel 11:30.
